name: LVSum: A Benchmark for Timestamp-Aware Long Video Summarization

description: arXiv:2604.10024v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Long video summarization presents significant challenges for multimodal large language models (MLLMs), particularly in maintaining temporal fidelity over extended durations and producing summaries that are both semantically and temporally grounded. We introduce LVSum, a human-annotated benchmark for evaluating long-form video summarizati...
author: Alkesh Patel, Melis Ozyildirim, Ying-Chang Cheng, Ganesh Nagarajan
